name: zhi
description: Zhi knowledge-base plugin for Codex. Build topic-scoped wikis, route across local hubs, ingest sources, compile articles, audit, query, lint, and generate outputs.

interface.longDescription: Zhi packages the LLM Wiki workflow as a paper-inspired knowledge plugin: local multi-hub routing, first-run scaffolding, source ingestion, catalog collection, inventory, dataset manifests, archive lifecycle, audit, query, lint, and sustained research.
defaultPrompt: Use Zhi to research a topic and compile it into a wiki.
Use Zhi to ingest notes or source collections into my local knowledge hub.
Use Zhi to query, audit, lint, or archive a wiki topic.
